steps.name: hybrid-search-contract
steps.summary: Added a tested pure search contract for published-only hybrid keyword/vector results, published-only related post candidates, search/related-posts-only embedding purposes, and pre-embedding search request guards for short, cached, duplicate, and rate-limited queries. No visitor chatbot, SSE UI, DB adapter, or /api/search route was added in this step.

steps.name: search-api-cost-guard
steps.summary: Added a tested /api/search cost guard execution contract with query cache TTL, duplicate/short/abnormal/rate-limited pre-embedding blocking, embedding adapter boundary, and usage_events recording for embedding calls.

steps.name: related-posts-similarity
steps.summary: Added a tested related-post similarity contract using fresh post_chunks only, with published-only targets, source/self exclusion, content_hash stale chunk rejection, similarity percentage/reason fields, and tag fallback ranked behind embedding matches.
